svg.title: Misa Cybernetic Evolution Layer v0.28 architecture
svg.desc: Two evidence lanes feed a measurement quality gate, L0-L4 cybernetic control, L3 feedback, and human bounded decision outputs.

g.text: measurement-first control loop for Hermes-style agents
SIGNAL INTAKE - two real evidence lanes
Lane B - Hermes runtime logs and model I/O
L0 SENSOR CONTRACT - do not trust unnamed signals
no raw prompt / token / tool args in repo
L1 EVIDENCE DISTILLATION - windows into controllable signals
candidate evidence + action monitor + model I/O verdict
checks measurement quality, not candidate quality
L2 VALIDATION - fail closed before judging the candidate
L3 ROUTE FEEDBACK - safe pressure, no self-rewrite

svg.text: L3 feedback tightens routes and repair prompts
no measurement -> no evolution claim · no clean measurement -> no candidate judgment · no human boundary -> no live authority
